about-us.title: About Us
about-us.content:
Developed since 2022. In 2024, Udata was invested in by DHG. In 2025, Udata was honored with the Sao Khue Award as recognition for its innovation efforts.

Udata is Vietnam's pioneering software platform in the field of IoT data collection, monitoring and analysis, helping businesses operate intelligently and develop sustainably. With core products such as Uboard, Umaintain, Uzero, Uvisual and Ubot, Udata is accompanying factories, buildings, industrial parks, and manufacturing enterprises on the journey of digital transformation and energy optimization according to ISO 50001, COP26, COP28 standards.

awards.title: Awards
awards.content:
In 2025, Udata was honored at the Sao Khue Award in the category “New products, solutions, software, services”.

The Sao Khue Award is Vietnam's most prestigious recognition for the software and IT industry, organized annually by the Vietnam Software and IT Services Association (VINASA) since 2003.

VINASA is the leading national association, representing over 500 top IT enterprises, promoting innovation, industry standards, and international cooperation. Being recognized by VINASA affirms Udata's position as a trusted innovator and leader in digital transformation solutions.

heroSection.heading: Welcome to Uboard
heroSection.excerpt: Centralized data monitoring – Quick decisions, standard operations

lists.title: Centralized management
lists.desc: Uboard allows you to manage all devices, in all areas, on a single platform, making management easy without moving around.

lists.title: AI Reports
lists.desc: Export periodic PDF/Excel reports, AI supports answering issues from report data.

lists.title: Real-time data collection and analysis
lists.desc: By continuously monitoring activities, Uboard helps you detect potential issues early and provide timely solutions.

lists.title: Role-based authorization
lists.desc: Clear roles, separated data, ensuring security and strict control.

lists.title: Smart KPI alerts
lists.desc: Set alert thresholds, detect anomalies early, instant notifications.

lists.title: Absolute security
lists.desc: Stable & secure cloud storage. Access anywhere, support private cloud, store 30 days when disconnected.

first.title: Application in rooftop solar operation monitoring
first.desc: With Udata's smart monitoring system, investors and operators can proactively manage rooftop solar systems effectively. Benefits: Increase electricity output by 2-5%; Reduce maintenance costs, minimize output loss due to silent failures.

second.title: Application in elevators, machinery operation monitoring
second.desc: With Udata's smart monitoring system, manufacturers and maintenance units can proactively monitor, detect anomalies early, and optimize elevator maintenance efficiency comprehensively. Benefits: Reduce periodic maintenance time by 25%; Improve technician efficiency; Optimize maintenance & technical personnel costs.

third.title: Application in performance management and machine maintenance (OEE)
third.desc: Analyze production activity data based on collected data to generate reports and alerts, helping factories make timely and accurate decisions. Benefits: Accurately calculate production costs by shift/machine/product; Increase equipment utilization efficiency (OEE) by 20–25%; Optimize production and maintenance plans.

fourth.title: Application in smart energy management (EMS)
fourth.desc: Monitor, analyze, and optimize consumption data from energy sources such as electricity, gas, heat, water... helping businesses reduce costs, improve efficiency, and move towards sustainable operations. Benefits: Save 4–15% energy in the first year; Increase ROI for equipment, extend lifespan, reduce system errors; Efficient and proactive energy management.

list.question: What types of devices and systems can Uboard connect to in an enterprise?
list.answer: Uboard offers flexible integration, supporting connections to various data sources such as electricity/water meters, Data Loggers, PLC/controllers, sensors, VFDs, and even ERP/HRM systems. The platform supports standard protocols like Modbus RTU/TCP, OPC UA, Open API, and connects with SCADA, BMS, IoT.

list.question: How does Uboard's smart alert feature work?
list.answer: Uboard provides smart alerts by detecting anomalies, predicting failures, and sending maintenance notifications via SMS/Email/App.

list.question: Does Uboard ensure data is not lost during network outages (Internet, 4G/5G) at the factory?
list.answer: Yes, through Udata Gateway, data is still stored during network outages thanks to Data Buffering. Uboard also stores data for 30 days when disconnected.

list.question: What is MiniUgate?
list.answer: MiniUgate is a no-code AI Chatbot platform for websites, helping you create smart chatbots in just a few minutes. No code, no IT needed – anyone can use it!

list.question: How long does it take to create a chatbot?
list.answer: You can create an AI chatbot for your website in just a few minutes with 3 simple steps: (1) Paste your website link, (2) Set up prompt/tone, (3) Copy embed code and add to your website.

list.question: Where does MiniUgate learn data from?
list.answer: MiniUgate chatbot learns from multiple sources: Your website, Documents, and FAQs that you provide. The chatbot will accurately understand the content and context of your business.

list.question: Is coding required?
list.answer: No coding needed! MiniUgate is a no-code platform, meaning anyone can create and manage chatbots without technical knowledge or IT skills.

list.question: How to embed chatbot on website?
list.answer: Very simple! After setting up the chatbot, just copy the embed code and paste it into your website. The chatbot will work immediately.

list.question: Does MiniUgate have support tickets?
list.answer: Yes! MiniUgate has a Support Tickets feature where AI + humans collaborate to handle important requests. When the chatbot cannot answer, requests are converted into tickets.

list.question: What benefits does MiniUgate provide?
list.answer: MiniUgate helps: Reduce customer support & sales workload, increase time-on-site by 20-30%, increase conversion rate by 15-30%, save 30-50% operational costs, and operate 24/7.

list.question: Is MiniUgate free?
list.answer: You can try MiniUgate for free! Visit mini.ugate.ai to sign up and start creating an AI chatbot for your website today.

list.question: How does MiniUgate work?
list.answer: Just 3 simple steps: Step 1 – Your website: Content is scanned & trained. Step 2 – MiniUgate AI: Processes & understands context. Step 3 – Live Chat: Responds to customers instantly. Completed in minutes.
